name: Global Business Travel Group, Inc.
summary: Overview American Express Global Business Travel, operated by Global Business Travel Group, Inc., a Delaware corporation, ("Amex GBT") is a leading technology and services company for travel, expense, and meetings & events. We are committed to offering companies and their travelers access to the most valuable marketplace in business travel for one simple reason: when people come together, great ideas come to life.
